query.query_string: Faricimab AND severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy

data.query: Faricimab AND severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy

results.title: MAGIC: Study Design and Rationale for the Phase 2 Clinical Trial of Faricimab for Non-Proliferative Diabetic Retinopathy.
results.abstract: Describe the design and rationale of the MAGIC (ClinicalTrials.gov identifier, NCT05681884) trial assessing change in retinal non-perfusion (RNP) among eyes with non-proliferative diabetic retinopathy (NPDR) in sham and treated patients.
results.journal: Ophthalmologica. Journal international d'ophtalmologie. International journal of ophthalmology. Zeitschrift fur Augenheilkunde
